text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
How splendid, Trainer! Strength really is all about
how you use it, no matter how small!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I've learned another new lesson today! For a
princess, merely being able to crush macadamia
nuts with her hands is not enough!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
A true princess must also have the delicate
precision to move tiny seeds between plates with
chopsticks!
